final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration featuring traditional Chinese ethnic minority costume (中国少数民族服饰), formatted as a scholarly exhibit panel for a national museum collection.

Style/medium: museum exhibit panel illustration, historical costume atlas (历史服饰图鉴), cultural heritage infographic — photorealistic central figure with structured annotation layout; NOT a poster, portrait photo, e-commerce page, or anime illustration
Composition: full vertical infographic layout with five zones —
  TOP: main Chinese title (主标题) + subtitle (副标题) + introductory text (导语)
  LEFT: structural breakdown zone (结构拆解区) with Chinese leader-line annotations on key garment components, plus close-up detail insets of individual parts
  UPPER RIGHT: material / craft / texture zone (材质/工艺/质感区) showing realistic fabric swatch samples with Chinese captions
  MIDDLE RIGHT: pattern / color / symbolism zone (纹样/色彩/寓意区) showing primary color palette swatches, pattern samples, and cultural meaning explanations in Chinese
  BOTTOM: dressing sequence / construction flow diagram (穿着顺序/构成流程图) + core characteristics summary (核心特征总结)
  Central main body: full-body standing figure of a person wearing the selected ethnic minority costume, rendered photorealistically, serving as the annotated subject
Subject: automatically selected most representative Chinese ethnic minority costume system — select the ethnic group, garment system, historical period, key components, craft techniques, and color scheme most suitable for a complete museum-quality breakdown; full-body standing figure in authentic attire as central visual anchor
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white / silk-paper white / pale tea-color paper texture background (米白/绢纸白/浅茶色), refined and restrained, no decorative gradients or busy patterns
Lighting/mood: even diffused scholarly lighting, neutral and controlled, museum exhibit quality — no dramatic shadows, no glamour lighting
Color palette: determined by the selected ethnic costume's authentic color system; background restricted to 米白/绢纸白/浅茶色; annotation lines and typography in deep ink tones (深墨色/深棕)
Materials/textures: paper-grain background texture; fabric swatch insets showing realistic weave, embroidery, or dye texture; garment rendered with accurate material differentiation (silk, cotton, wool, embroidery, silver ornament surfaces as applicable)
Text (verbatim): 所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰、规整、可读；包含：主标题、副标题、导语、各部件引线标注名称、材质说明文字、纹样寓意说明、色彩含义说明、穿着顺序步骤、核心特征总结；不得出现英文、拼音、乱码或错字
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters only — no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters; leader lines must connect accurately to the correct garment parts; fabric swatches must look like real textile samples; color palette must reflect authentic ethnic costume colors; layout must fill all five zones completely; figure must be full-body standing pose
Avoid: poster aesthetic, portrait-studio feel, e-commerce product page feel, anime or illustration style, cosplay aesthetic, misaligned annotations, structurally incorrect garment depiction, blurry or unreadable text, fake or generic textures, excessive decorative ornamentation, English labels, pinyin labels
